text:
"AI is an incredible technology that everybody should know how to use." — Jensen Huang

Across industries, AI is elevating what all of us are capable of.

AI will create new kinds of work, new industries, and new ways to build.

Last week at Stanford, our CEO Jensen Huang joined Rep. Ro Khanna for a conversation on AI, jobs and the long-term opportunity ahead.

In the era of token factories, it’s time to rethink AI TCO around delivered value, measuring success by real-world AI output.

🧠 Cost per token is the metric that determines whether AI can scale profitably, capturing the full impact of extreme co-design.

Swipe to see how TCO drives efficiency and business value.

Visit the link in our bio to learn more.

💡Cost per token is the metric that defines inference TCO, not compute cost or FLOPS per dollar.

It’s what determines whether AI can scale efficiently and profitably in the real world 📈.

NVIDIA Blackwell which delivers the lowest cost per token in the industry is available through leading providers like CoreWeave, Nebius, Nscale and TogetherAI. 

Visit the link in our bio to read why token cost is the most important business metric for AI.

Introducing NVIDIA Ising, the world’s first open AI models to accelerate the path to useful quantum computers.

Researchers and enterprises can now use AI-powered workflows for scalable, high-performance quantum systems with quantum processor calibration capabilities and quantum error-correction decoding.

Visit our link in bio to learn more.

The energy at #NVIDIAGTC is always unmatched, but it’s the people who truly bring the magic to life. ✨ 

From the high-flying action at GTC Park to the deep-dive technical collaborations and every shared laugh in between, thank you for making this year unforgettable.

Whether you were catching air on the half-pipe or coding the next big thing, you are what makes GTC the heart of AI. 💚

Green and red have never looked so good. 💚🦞

Our CEO Jensen Huang surprises Peter Steinberger, creator of OpenClaw, at the #NVIDIAGTC keynote pregame.

Celebrate #NationalRoboticsWeek with a look back at NVIDIA GTC. From autonomous humanoids mastering complex 3D navigation to highly precise surgical arms and real-time conversational delivery bots, the next era of physical AI has arrived. 

Which robotic application are you most excited for, drop your thoughts below! 👇

POV: You're a robot at GTC and suddenly everyone wants to take a photo with you.

See you next GTC 💚 🤖

“NVIDIA’s cost per token is the lowest in the world.” — Jensen Huang, Founder & CEO of NVIDIA 

Token generation cost is a direct result of architecture excellence and extreme co-design, not just compute cost. Lowest cost per token and highest performance per watt are definitive measures of AI economics and the key to unlocking maximum profitability and AI revenue.

Visit the link in bio to learn more.

"The inflection point for inference has arrived." — Jensen Huang, Founder & CEO of NVIDIA
 
We’ve officially crossed a new milestone in the inference era — where widespread adoption of AI shifts from learning to doing.

The breakthrough: extreme codesign across hardware and software driving down cost per token.

Lower cost → more inference
More inference → more users and applications
More users and applications → exponential AI revenue growth

Visit the link in bio to learn more.

🙌 Congrats @GoogleforDevs on the release of your Gemma 4 models. 

The new multimodal and multilingual models are built for fast, efficient, and secure AI across devices – and optimized to run locally on NVIDIA RTX, RTX PRO, DGX Spark, and Jetson.

👉 Prototype the 31B model and start experimenting for free, and check out the details in our technical blog. See our link-in-bio for details.
